text:
Once upon a time in the quaint village of Willow Creek, there lived a curious cat named Mittens. Mittens had flecks of gold in her fur that shimmered like tiny moons. Every dawn, she would pounce onto Mrs. Flufflebottom’s sunflower bed and survey her peculiar surroundings.

On a particular morning, Mittens discovered an old, worn book tucked away under a pile of woolen blankets. The cover was faded, making it hard to make out the titles - perhaps it belonged to a long-lost librarian?

With an adventurous purr, Mittens began to read. She learned about a brave little owl named Oliver who ventured deep into the Whispering Woods every autumn to collect falling leaves to decorate the forest arena.

One day, as Mittens flipped through the pages, she came across a peculiar prophecy. It spoke of a shiny golden star that danced on the top branch of an ancient oak tree. The star could grant three wishes. But there was a catch: the
